mnemonics.title: Tuple vs List
mnemonics.content: Tuples are immutable, lists are mutable.

mnemonics.title: Set Operations
mnemonics.content: Union: A | B, Intersection: A & B, Difference: A - B

acronyms.usage: OOP concepts include encapsulation, inheritance, and polymorphism.

visualTips.visualization: Imagine two overlapping circles. The intersection is the area where they overlap.

analogies.analogy: Think of a tuple like a sealed envelope. Once it's sealed, you can't change its contents.
